retry_reason: Not applicable – the put is reached only on specific paths, but when called it unconditionally succeeds. There is no failure to retry.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to free a dummy root, which involves validation checks, deletion from the global root list, and releasing the reference via btrfs_put_root. The refcount put is only one step among several essential cleanup operations. This is not a focused refcount management wrapper; rather it is a destroy function that happens to call a put as part of the teardown.
